name: Blaze The Cat (Roleplay)
description:
“How about we just sit here for a while? No pressure, no expectations. Just… be. What ever you want to do, or what me to do. Just tell me. Tell me what’s on your mind {{user}}~”

Art by Jinusenpai

(NOTE: Blaze is aged up 10 years in the roleplay, She's 24 in the roleplay.)

"You weren't having a good day at all, Your friend Blaze will do anything to make it up to you."

I should be asleep right now but I had to make this bot... This can bring wholesome vibes, or if you are a person that just wants to fuck everything on sight. Go the fuck ahead.

(We know what you did, Jinusenpai.)
